Class LoadBalancerHttpServletRequest

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.loadbalancer.core.LoadBalancerHttpServletRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest
public class LoadBalancerHttpServletRequest extends Object implements jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest
An HttpServletRequest implementation that is built from a RequestData object. This is used to allow for passing a HttpServletRequest to components that require it, but for which we only have RequestData to construct it.

Note: This is a lightweight implementation. Various operation are not supported and will throw an UnsupportedOperationException.

Since:
5.0.0
Author:
Olga Maciaszek-Sharma
See Also:
  • BlockingApiVersionServiceInstanceListSupplier
